creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2012-03-03 13:21:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt           Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/mkreadmes Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
  Log:
  Mkreadmes is designed to be a very fast, flexible and easy-to-use alternative
  to the standard "make readmes" for building the README.html files for the
  FreeBSD Ports Collection, building the files in a fraction of the time of the
  standard method.
  
  PR:             ports/165631
  Submitted by:   Conrad J. Sabatier <conrads@cox.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.53      +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/mkreadmes/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/mkreadmes/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/mkreadmes/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/mkreadmes/pkg-message (new)
